articles.title: Stablecoins on L2 networks just surpassed $10B
articles.description: Major L2 chains crossed the threshold of $10B in stablecoins. Inflows from Ethereum and the presence of lively apps raised demand for stablecoins for top L2 like Arbitrum.

articles.title: Hoskinson debunks locked Cardano staking claims amid new network milestones
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has dismissed the “lies and misinformation” surrounding the network’s staking operations. In a Sept. 11 post on X, Hoskinson expressed frustration over the spread of misinformation about ADA, noting that the network does not lock its staked tokens. He stated: “The lies and misinformation about Cardano have reached epic levels. Stake […]

articles.title: Solana (SOL), Cardano (ADA) and GoodEgg (GEGG): 3 Cryptocurrencies You Must Purchase In September For gains
articles.description: September is shaping up to be a critical month for the cryptocurrency market, with top coins like Solana (SOL), Cardano (ADA), and GoodEgg (GEGG) showing great potential for gains. articles.title: US CPI Data Drops To 2.5%: A Sign of Economic Stability?
articles.description: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics has reported a drop in August’s Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate to 2.5%, falling below the expected 2.6%. This marks the end of a 40-month streak where inflation stayed at or above 2.9%, and it’s the fifth month in a row of declining CPI inflation. The drop in …

articles.title: Cardano Creator Debunks ADA FUD
articles.description: Cardano founder and ADA community voice concerns over staking FUD

articles.title: Trump Meme Coins Plunge Following ‘Unhinged’ Presidential Debate
articles.description: Meme coins linked to presidential candidate Donald Trump have slumped following the first debate with rival candidate Kamala Harris.
